name: Nucleus Software Exports Limited
summary: Nucleus Software Exports Limited provides software solutions in India, the Far East, South East Asia, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, Australia, and internationally. Its products include FinnOne Neo, a lending solution designed to support retail, corporate, and Islamic sectors comprising customer acquisition system, a loan origination software; loan management system, a bank loan management solution; web based and workflow driven solution that allows financial institutions to manage, monitor, and control the delinquent loan accounts; enterprise content management that automates the document management processes; finance against securities that establishes credit lines to individuals and corporate against the pledging of financial securities; and lending analytics, a solution for decision making. The company also offers FinnOne Neo digital portal for loan self-sourcing; digital channels that enable banks and financial services companies to provide digital lending on mobile and web portals; and lending mobility suite. In addition, it provides FinnAxia, an integrated global transaction banking solution comprising global receivables, global payments, global liquidity management, and virtual account management; FinnAxia digital compass, business internet banking, and advisory services; and FarEdge anomaly detector to detect fraudulent and dual transactions. Further, the company offers project management, consulting, training and testing, support, and analytics; application development and management, digital transformation, data management and analytics, mobile and Web application, and verification and validation; and managed infrastructure services comprising 24x7 help desk, network, end user computing and end point security, infrastructure application support, and data center. It serves retail, corporate, and Islamic banking, as well as other sectors. Nucleus Software Exports Limited was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Noida, India.
